data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for auditability of tier at time of access, but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and offers, none of them directly address the auditability of membership tiers or their access at the time of booking. This indicates a lack of concrete evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's satisfaction, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of auditability of tier at time of access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
